basic_details.job_title: AIIMS Nagpur Tutor/Demonstrator Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: All India Institute of Medical Sciences, Nagpur (AIIMS Nagpur)
basic_details.short_information: All India Institute of Medical Sciences, Nagpur (AIIMS Nagpur) has released an official notification for the recruitment of 2 Tutor/Demonstrator Posts. Interested and eligible candidates can apply Online through the official AIIMS Nagpur website. The last date to submit the application form is 01-06-2026.

age_limit.age_details: Not exceeding 30 years as on 01st June 2026. Relaxation for ST/SC: 05 years, OBC: 03 years. PwD: up to 10 years (General), 13 years (OBC), 15 years (SC/ST).
age_limit.details: The maximum age limit is 30 years as on 01st June 2026. Age Relaxation: ST/SC: 05 years OBC: 03 years Persons with Disabilities (General): up to 10 years Persons with Disabilities (OBC): up to 13 years Persons with Disabilities (SC/ST): up to 15 years

qualification.education_qualification: Medical qualification included in the I or II Schedule or part II of the third schedule to the Indian Medical Council Act of 1956. Must have completed one year of Compulsory Internship. For Non-Medical Candidates: Postgraduate qualification e.g. Master's degree in the Discipline /allied subject.
qualification.details: Tutor/Demonstrator: Medical qualification included in the I or II Schedule or part II of the third schedule to the Indian Medical Council Act of 1956 (persons possessing qualification included in part II or third schedule should also fulfill the conditions specified in section 13 (3) of the Act). Must have completed one year of Compulsory Internship. Postgraduate qualification e.g. Master's degree in the Discipline /allied subject (for Non-Medical Candidates). Experience: One year compulsory internship for medical candidates.

salary_details.details: Pay Scale: As per 7th CPC with Basic Pay Rs. 56100/ (Level-10 and Cell-1). Allowances: Other usual allowances per month in the first year of residency. NPA is not applicable to non-medical candidates.

selection_process: Written test/interview MCQ based Written test Interview by selection committee
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 01-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of AIIMS Nagpur to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
